extract: Stone Edge (Japanese: ストーンエッジ Stone Edge) is a damage-dealing Rock-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is: TM71 from Generation IV to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TR75 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM150 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM065 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. In Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, it can be upgraded to the special Z-Move Splintered Stormshards by Lycanroc holding Lycanium Z.
